expectations.text: Correctly identifies that passing visitor cookie IDs and browsing data to an ad tech platform for cross-context behavioral advertising constitutes 'sharing' under CPRA even if no money changes hands
expectations.evidence: Response correctly identifies this as 'sharing' under CPRA § 1798.140(ah) because CPRA explicitly covers cross-context behavioral advertising disclosures 'whether or not for monetary or other valuable consideration.'

expectations.text: Explains that the same arrangement could also be a 'sale' under CCPA if the ad tech platform provides any valuable consideration (e.g., access to inventory, data enrichment)
expectations.evidence: Response explains the activity likely also constitutes a 'sale' because ad tech platforms provide valuable consideration: access to inventory, data enrichment, audience modeling, attribution reporting, or reduced fees.

expectations.text: States the business must add a 'Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information' link and must honor Global Privacy Control (GPC) signals as valid opt-outs
expectations.evidence: Response states the required homepage opt-out link and that GPC signals must be honored as valid opt-outs immediately upon receipt — no separate consumer request required.

expectations.text: Explains that the ad tech platform must be classified as a 'third party' (not a service provider) unless a contractual arrangement prohibits the platform from using the data for any other purpose — and service provider contracts must be reviewed
expectations.evidence: Response explains service provider status requires contract prohibiting ALL other uses; standard ad tech contracts almost never meet this bar because the platform's business model depends on using customer data across their network.

expectations.text: Advises on the practical steps: update privacy policy, implement consent management platform (CMP), configure ad tech to stop receiving PI for opted-out consumers
expectations.evidence: Response covers auditing contracts, updating privacy policy, implementing CMP with GPC detection, configuring ad tech tags to suppress PI for opted-out consumers, posting required link, and honoring opt-outs within 15 business days.
